---
title: "birdcastdata"
format: html
---

## tibbles
```{r}
library(plotly)
library(tidyverse)

bird_cast_slc <- tibble(
  date = c("04/12/2026", "04/11/2026", "04/10/2026", "04/09/2026", "04/08/2026", "04/07/2026", "04/06/2026", "04/05/2026", "04/04/2026", "04/03/2026", "04/02/2026", "04/01/2026", "03/31/2026", "03/30/2026", "03/29/2026", "03/28/2026", "03/27/2026", "03/26/2026", "03/25/2026", "03/24/2026", "03/23/2026", "03/22/2026", "03/21/2026", "03/20/2026", "03/19/2026", "03/18/2026", "03/17/2026", "03/16/2026", "03/15/2026", "03/14/2026", "03/13/2026", "03/12/2026", "03/11/2026", "03/10/2026", "03/09/2026", "03/08/2026", "03/07/2026", "03/06/2026", "03/05/2026", "03/04/2026", "03/03/2026", "03/02/2026",
  "03/01/2026"),
  birds = c(459900, 47400, 2600, 1465100, 1157700, 8900, 32500, 3200, 870600, 159800, 59000, 11900, 3600, 43600, 599500, 6700, 1400, 900, 103500, 19700, 1400, 1400, 9300, 1800, 1100, 4500, 600, 1800, 26600, 2100, 7300, 600, 8700, 7900, 59800, 38800, 9900, 4300, 700, 4300, 1700, 10300, 2900),
  flight_speed = c(50, 8, 7, 42, 44, 9, 10, 34, 67, 18, 53, 8, NA, 20, 40, 9, NA, 18, 28, 14, NA, NA, 10, NA, 23, 18, NA, 27, NA, NA, 31, 12, NA, NA, 19, 18, 15, 39, NA, NA, NA, 13, NA)
)
bird_cast_slc <- bird_cast_slc |>
  mutate(date = mdy(date))
bird_cast_slc


bird_cast_fc <- tibble(
  date = c("04/12/2026", "04/11/2026", "04/10/2026", "04/09/2026", "04/08/2026","04/07/2026", "04/06/2026", "04/05/2026", "04/04/2026", "04/03/2026", "04/02/2026", "04/01/2026", "03/31/2026", "03/30/2026", "03/29/2026", "03/28/2026", "03/27/2026", "03/26/2026", "03/25/2026", "03/24/2026", "03/23/2026","03/22/2026", "03/21/2026","03/20/2026", "03/19/2026", "03/18/2026", "03/17/2026", "03/16/2026", "03/15/2026", "03/14/2026", "03/13/2026", "03/12/2026", "03/11/2026", "03/10/2026", "03/09/2026", "03/08/2026", "03/07/2026", "03/06/2026", "03/05/2026", "03/04/2026", "03/03/2026", "03/02/2026",
  "03/01/2026"),
  birds = c(1356700, 82300, 261300, 195300, 25100, 100, 10200, 100, 645900, 1008200, 261900, 143200, 775500,  227000, 744100, 4400, 0, 280100, 465300, 87900, 0, 506200, 409700, 7900, 123700, 7500, 0, 300, 32900, 19300, 54600, 3100, 342900, 537200, 414300, 30300, 951100, 9200, 15800, 37100, 10400, 0, 1100),
  flight_speed = c(52, 24, 36, 26, 25, NA, 17, NA, 49, 38, 51, 22, 51, 49, 53, 13, NA, 49, 45, 32, NA, 30, 41, 29, 36, NA, NA, 36, 48, 24, 38, 20, 57, 42, 31, 19, 49, 22, 34, 37, 28, NA, 25))
bird_cast_fc <- bird_cast_fc |>
  mutate(date = mdy(date))
bird_cast_fc


bird_cast_mc <- tibble(
  date = c("04/12/2026", "04/11/2026", "04/10/2026", "04/09/2026", "04/08/2026","04/07/2026", "04/06/2026", "04/05/2026", "04/04/2026", "04/03/2026", "04/02/2026", "04/01/2026", "03/31/2026", "03/30/2026", "03/29/2026", "03/28/2026", "03/27/2026", "03/26/2026", "03/25/2026", "03/24/2026", "03/23/2026","03/22/2026", "03/21/2026","03/20/2026", "03/19/2026", "03/18/2026", "03/17/2026", "03/16/2026", "03/15/2026", "03/14/2026", "03/13/2026", "03/12/2026", "03/11/2026", "03/10/2026", "03/09/2026", "03/08/2026", "03/07/2026", "03/06/2026", "03/05/2026", "03/04/2026", "03/03/2026", "03/02/2026",
  "03/01/2026"),
  birds = c(27100, 11400, 16800, 35000, 39500, 28000, 27500, 59500, 18900, 47200, 45000, 49700, 18200, 51900, 13600, 3700, 6900, 9800, 16000, 19300, 13500, 17000, 4600, 700, 0, 0, 0, 4500, 76200, 42000, 10400, 11200, 107000, 19200, 14400, 36900, 24900, 11800, 11000, 12700, 1600, 700, 400),
  flight_speed = c(15, 18, 14, 23, 21, 3, 10, 15, 19, 24, 21, 20, 18, 20, 18, 7, 14, 18, 17, 11, 12, 12, 17, NA, NA, 9, 12, 19, 36, 9, 3, 8, 28, 12, 14, 18, 8, 17, 22, 18, 18, NA, NA))
bird_cast_mc <- bird_cast_mc |>
  mutate(date = mdy(date))
bird_cast_mc
```


## st lawrence county birds by day
```{r}
slc <- ggplot(data = bird_cast_slc, aes(x = date, y = birds, label = flight_speed)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 week", date_labels = "%b %d") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "BirdCast Migration Data in St. Lawrence County", y = "Number of Birds", x = "Date")

ggplotly(slc, tooltips = "label")

```

## fairfax county birds by day
```{r}
fc <- ggplot(data = bird_cast_fc, aes(x = date, y = birds, label = flight_speed)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 week", date_labels = "%b %d") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "BirdCast Migration Data in Fairfax County", y = "Number of Birds", x = "Date")

ggplotly(fc, tooltips = "label")
```

## monroe county birds by day
```{r}
mc <- ggplot(data = bird_cast_mc, aes(x = date, y = birds, label = flight_speed)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 week", date_labels = "%b %d") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "BirdCast Migration Data in Monroe County", y = "Number of Birds", x = "Date")

ggplotly(mc, tooltips = "label")
```



## plot of all three together
```{r}
bird_cast_all <- bind_rows(
  bird_cast_slc |> mutate(location = "St. Lawrence County"),
  bird_cast_fc  |> mutate(location = "Fairfax County"),
  bird_cast_mc  |> mutate(location = "Monroe County")
) |>
  arrange(date)

ggplot(data = bird_cast_all, aes(x = date, y = birds, color = location)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 week", date_labels = "%b %d") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_viridis_d() +
  labs(title = "BirdCast Migration Data", y = "Number of Birds", x = "Date", color = "Location") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

## scale_y_continuous and scale_x_date sourced from claude
## prompt: how can i make my plot look more readable?

## idk if facet should be present or not
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)

library(readr)
X4285590 <- read_csv("data/4285590.csv")

X4285610 <- read_csv("data/4285610.csv")
X4292861 <- read_csv("data/4292861.csv")

# --- Load & clean 4285590 (St. Lawrence County, NY) ---
weather_slc <- X4285590 |>
  select(NAME, DATE, PRCP, TMAX, TMIN, TAVG, SNOW) |>
  mutate(DATE = ymd(DATE)) |>
  group_by(DATE) |>
  summarise(
    prcp  = mean(PRCP, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmax  = mean(TMAX, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmin  = mean(TMIN, na.rm = TRUE),
    tavg  = mean(TAVG, na.rm = TRUE),
    snow  = mean(SNOW, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(location = "St. Lawrence County")   

# --- Load & clean 4285610 (Fairfax County, VA) ---
weather_fc <- X4285610 |>
  select(STATION, DATE, PRCP, TMAX, TMIN, TAVG, SNOW) |>
  mutate(DATE = ymd(DATE)) |>
  group_by(DATE) |>
  summarise(
    prcp  = mean(PRCP, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmax  = mean(TMAX, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmin  = mean(TMIN, na.rm = TRUE),
    tavg  = mean(TAVG, na.rm = TRUE),
    snow  = mean(SNOW, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(location = "Fairfax County") 

weather_mc <- X4292861 |>
  mutate(DATE = ymd(DATE)) |>
  group_by(DATE) |
  summarize(
    tmax  = mean(TMAX, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmin  = mean(TMIN, na.rm = TRUE),
    tavg  = mean(TAVG, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(location = "Monroe County")

# --- Combine both weather datasets ---
weather_combined <- bind_rows(weather_slc, weather_fc)

# --- Join with BirdCast data ---
# bird_combined already has: date, birds, flight_speed, location
bird_weather <- bird_cast_all |>
  left_join(weather_combined, by = c("date" = "DATE", "location" = "location"))

bird_weather
```

```{r}
bird_weather_slc <- bird_weather |> filter(location == "St. Lawrence County") |>
  mutate(birds = birds/10000)
  
library(broom)
library(ggeffects)

mod_slc <- lm(birds ~ tmax, data = bird_weather_slc) 
mod_slc |> tidy()

pred_slc <- ggpredict(mod_slc, terms = "tmax") |>
  as.data.frame(terms_to_colnames = TRUE) |>
  as_tibble()

ggplot(data = bird_weather_slc, aes(x = tmax, y = birds)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line(data = pred_slc, aes(x = tmax, y = predicted),
            colour = "blue", linewidth = 1.2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Relationship between daily maximum temperature and number of migratory birds in SLC", x = "Daily Max Temp", y = "Number of Birds (in tens of thousands)")
```

```{r}
bird_weather_fc <- bird_weather |> filter(location == "Fairfax County") |>
  mutate(birds = birds/10000)

mod_fc <- lm(birds ~ tmax, data = bird_weather_fc) 
mod_fc |> tidy()

pred_fc <- ggpredict(mod_slc, terms = "tmax") |>
  as.data.frame(terms_to_colnames = TRUE) |>
  as_tibble()

ggplot(data = bird_weather_fc, aes(x = tmax, y = birds)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line(data = pred_fc, aes(x = tmax, y = predicted),
            colour = "blue", linewidth = 1.2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Relationship between daily maximum temperature and number of migratory birds in FC", x = "Daily Max Temp", y = "Number of Birds (in tens of thousands)")
```

```{r}
mod <- lm(birds ~ tmax + tmax:location, data = bird_weather)
mod |> tidy()

pred <- ggpredict(mod, terms = "tmax") |>
  as.data.frame(terms_to_colnames = TRUE) |>
  as_tibble()

ggplot(data = bird_weather, aes(x = tmax, y = birds)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line(data = pred, aes(x = tmax, y = predicted), color = "blue", linewidth = 1.2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap(~location)
```
